Related Entities

  • hospital CAROMONT REGIONAL MEDICAL CENTER 4-star overall rating
  • snf Accordius Health at Gastonia 2-star, 118 beds
  • snf The Greens at Gastonia 1-star, 162 beds
  • snf Carolina Care Health and Rehabilitation 4-star, 107 beds
  • snf Stanley Total Living Center 2-star, 106 beds
  • snf Juniper Gardens Center for Nursing and Rehabilitat 3-star, 50 beds
  • snf Courtland Terrace 5-star, 77 beds
  • snf Peak Resources-Cherryville 5-star, 70 beds
  • snf Gastonia Health & Rehab Center 2-star, 60 beds
  • snf Belaire Health Care Center 2-star, 80 beds
  • snf Peak Resources - Gastonia 5-star, 104 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
